docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA VIA, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, MANUEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-26-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-27-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-11-2007
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-19-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ANTHONY LA VIA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-19-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-04-2007. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: GENA EALES, CSR	176. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-26-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-12-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ANTHONY LA VIA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-12-2007, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-27-2007. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR# 7782. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2007 CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-11-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-11-2007 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MAUREEN HOWARD, CSR#7156. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR#7156. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Continued To Jun-11-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/11/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-12-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176. (212)
